prompt: 状态传播: US-020 从 In Progress 变为 Done，需要同步到 UPM requirements 和相关 Epic 进度

assertions.name: propagates_to_upm
assertions.description: Should propagate Done status to UPM requirements entry

assertions.name: updates_epic_progress
assertions.description: Should update the parent Epic progress percentage

assertions.name: reports_propagation_scope
assertions.description: Should report how many documents were updated
